phases.title: PHASE 1 Requirements Identification and Team Building-1111

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: **Business Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making chains of the business work corresponding to this case, good at communication, familiar with basic project management operations

**Business-side Technical Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with the technical functions and processes, construction and planning actually used/expected to be involved in the business work corresponding to this case, assists business liaison in technical-level communication, recommends architect or technical project manager as first choice, followed by specific technical executors (such as backend engineers, etc.)

**Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with the industry-standard technical architecture and processes, construction and planning of the business work corresponding to this case, good at communication, familiar with basic project management operations

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: Business liaison and algorithm liaison conduct initial requirements contact and brainstorming exchange to sort out the core requirements of this case
Business liaison and algorithm liaison form a working group and contact group, clarify the liaisons and contact methods

Business liaison (representing the requirements side team) fills in the project cooperation requirements inquiry form provided by the algorithm liaison (representing the contractor team); if there are clear ideas and multiple sub-tasks can be broken down, the sub-task algorithm requirements template can be further filled in
Both parties communicate and supplement other materials needed for requirements confirmation, such as sample data, professional knowledge reference materials, etc.
Algorithm liaison coordinates their own team to conduct requirements assessment based on the meeting content and feedback documents and materials

subsections.title: Related Resources
content: Template: [Preliminary Verification Requirements Document Template](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/PC8FwObgwiMwVPkM0i4cYkr2nYf?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: Results Output
content: Establish working group, clarify liaisons and contact methods
Start filling in the preliminary verification requirements document, conduct research and organization of relevant information

subsections.title: Implementation Cycle
content: 1-3 days

phases.title: PHASE 2 Value Confirmation and Requirements Refinement

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: **Business Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
**Business-side Technical Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1

**Business Expert (x1)**: Leader, executor or expert involved in core business modules of the business work corresponding to this case, assists business liaison in clarifying business pain points and values

**Product Manager (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making chains of the business work corresponding to this case, good at communication, assists business liaison in refining requirements and designing prototypes, this position can be provided by the contractor or served by the business liaison
**Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1

**Algorithm Expert (x1)**: Familiar with current industry frontier and general technical solutions and selections in various scenarios and applications, assists algorithm liaison in evaluating requirements, coordinating team for research, design solutions and architecture, assists in evaluating scheduling, can be served by algorithm liaison

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: Business liaison communicates with their business experts and related teams to confirm the expected goals and business value of this solution implementation, business value needs to be quantified as much as possible with comparative data (such as current numbers, expected achievement goals, expected degree of improvement compared to current status, etc.)
Algorithm liaison communicates with their algorithm experts and related teams to list items to be confirmed, while conducting preliminary research, evaluation, and design of the solution

Product manager communicates with business liaison and algorithm liaison to clarify requirements, then organizes relevant personnel from both parties to write preliminary verification requirements document

Both parties confirm requirements based on preliminary verification requirements document, plan scheduling, budget and resources based on confirmed requirements. Scheduling suggestion: First, the contractor completing preliminary verification, selection, producing Demo, and passing PoC as the first milestone; afterwards, both parties further negotiate formal project initiation
Repeat the above steps until the preliminary verification requirements document is finalized

subsections.title: Related Resources
content: Template: [Preliminary Verification Requirements Document Template](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/PC8FwObgwiMwVPkM0i4cYkr2nYf?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: Results Output
content: Preliminary Verification Requirements Document: [Preliminary Verification Requirements Document](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/UK3nwnHFuiZtxzkhAhvczfDDn5g?from=from_copylink)
PoC-related matters confirmation, such as start time, acceptance time, acceptance plan, etc.

subsections.title: Implementation Cycle
content: 1-2 weeks

phases.title: PHASE 3 Preliminary Verification and Project Initiation

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: **Business Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
**Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1

**Product Manager (x1)**: Same as PHASE 2, additionally needs to be proficient in using common no-code/low-code ("drag and drop" method) intelligent agent workflow platforms (such as Bisheng, Dify, etc.)

**Algorithm Engineer (x1)**: Master at least one backend programming language (such as Python, etc.); familiar with Docker; master private deployment and large model configuration of common intelligent agent platforms (such as Dify, etc.), can be served by algorithm liaison

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: Resource preparation and environment configuration
Claude Code installation and configuration
tavily-mcp service construction and startup
metaso-mcp service construction and startup
github, huggingface, arxiv-mcp service construction and startup (optional)
Use Claude Code to generate research reports
Algorithm team writes preliminary verification report
Complete PoC
Both parties communicate closely to confirm whether to formally initiate the project
If formal project initiation is determined, both parties adjust the Demo effect plan, finalize the project initiation report, prepare project initiation agreement and startup matters

subsections.title: Related Resources
content: Claude Code GitHub: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Tavily Installation Documentation: https://docs.tavily.com/documentation/mcp
Metaso Installation Documentation: https://www.modelscope.cn/mcp/servers/metasota/metaso-search
mcp-python-sdk GitHub: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk
Template: [Preliminary Verification Report Template](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/HKZGwXetBije9HklRQmcAe94nZE?from=from_copylink)
Template: [Project Initiation Report Template](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/R0jrwxeDfiBpsEkqZdYcZtgJncd?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: Results Output
content: Finalize and deliver preliminary verification report: [Preliminary Verification Report](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/EpdnwqYsri1TZDkRYNVcgE1TnYe?from=from_copylink)
Complete Demo construction, prepare and finally pass PoC
Write and deliver project initiation report: [Project Initiation Report](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/EioZwicWhiWcfek81q9cCl7bnGb?from=from_copylink)
Project initiation agreement (attachments should include delivery, acceptance, scheduling, resources, etc. for the official launch version)

subsections.title: Implementation Cycle
content: 3.5-7 days

phases.title: PHASE 4 Official Launch and Optimization Iteration

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: Determined according to the project initiation report

subsections.title: Implementation Content
content: Complete formal project initiation, determine start time
Implement and deliver according to project initiation report content and scheduling plan
Review and accept according to project initiation report goals and processes
Conduct operations and iteration according to project initiation report planning
Complete project closure according to project initiation report planning and agreement provisions

subsections.title: Results Output
content: All materials agreed upon by both parties throughout the project lifecycle
Officially launched product

subsections.title: Implementation Cycle
content: 3-6 months (varies depending on specific circumstances)
